FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: We solve your doubts about the acquisition, security, and guarantees of our Bybit accounts.
FAQ.q1: Is it safe to buy a Bybit account?
FAQ.a1: Absolutely. We deliver accounts with a clean environment to avoid any red flags. Once received, you take full control of the security.
FAQ.q2: What exactly do I receive after payment?
FAQ.a2: You will receive a secure file with the original email, password, 2FA keys, and documents associated with the Latam verification.
FAQ.q3: Do you have a warranty if the account is blocked?
FAQ.a3: Yes, we offer a 30-day replacement warranty if the account suffers restrictions unrelated to your trading activity.
FAQ.q4: Can I use the account from Spain or Europe?
FAQ.a4: Yes. Being Latam accounts, you can access derivatives and futures products restricted in the EU, provided you follow our security guides.
FAQ.q5: Do I always need to use a VPN or Proxy?
FAQ.a5: It is highly recommended. To protect the account's longevity, we advise you on the use of dedicated residential proxies.
FAQ.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a6: We accept 100% anonymous payments through cryptocurrencies (USDT, USDC, and Bitcoin) to ensure your privacy.
FAQ.q7: Is the account only for me?
FAQ.a7: Yes, each account belongs to a single owner. Once we hand over the keys, we delete any access records.
FAQ.q8: How do I contact support if I have problems?
FAQ.a8: Our team is available 24/7 via Telegram for any technical doubts or access issues you may have.
FAQ.more_questions_desc: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
